data.title: Trump's Support For Dollar-Pegged Crypto Will Fast-Track Digital Euro Approval: ECB
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is hopeful that the recent support for dollar-pegged cryptocurrencies from U.S. President Donald Trump will speed up the legislative approval process for the digital euro.

data.title: Ford CEO Jim Farley Says Trump's Proposed Tariffs On Mexico, Canada Will Be Manageable In Near Term But Will Have 'Huge Impact' If Protracted
data.description: Ford Motor Co CEO Jim Farley addressed the uncertainty surrounding proposed tariffs on imports from Mexico and Canada on U.S. automakers, saying it would wipe out billions of dollars of industry profits if protracted.

data.title: Ethereum Faces 'Intense Competition' From Solana, Struggles To Compete With Bitcoin: JPMorgan
